name: applications
author: Taako
description: A configurable Discord application/form cog with panels, DM or modal questionnaires, review buttons, role actions, CSV exports, polls, and Red-Web-Dashboard integration.
install_msg: applications loaded. Use `[p]application create` to create a form, `[p]application question add` to add questions, `[p]application panel` to post an apply panel, or Red-Web-Dashboard to manage forms visually.
short: Application forms with panels, review buttons, role actions, exports, polls, and dashboard support.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-guild application configuration, panel message IDs, poll records, applicant user IDs, application responses, reviewer user IDs, votes, and role/channel IDs.
